src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Removed explicit PostgreSQL 10 dialect configuration to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect, which is safer for newer JDK/Driver versions.
Changed the database driver from H2 (in-memory) to PostgreSQL to align with the production database setup.
Updated the JDBC URL to point to a local PostgreSQL instance instead of an in-memory H2 database.
Updated database username and password placeholders for the PostgreSQL connection.
Removed the specific profile activation line, likely because the configuration is now intended to be the default or handled differently.
